source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, the diodes are silicon diodes with a forward voltage drop of 0.7V, \( R1 = 4 \, \text{k}\Omega \), and \( R2 = 3 \, \text{k}\Omega \). The conduction states of the diodes are
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Both \( VD1 \) and \( VD2 \) are conducting

choice_map.C: \( VD1 \) is conducting, \( VD2 \) is not conducting
choice_map.D: \( VD1 \) is not conducting, \( VD2 \) is conducting
